product.name: Triton Pilot
product.summary: A human-supervised command center with owner-approved agent spending and monthly subscription support.
audiences: software agents operating within owner-defined budgets

payments.note: Triton remains invoice or verified-intent only because it is a custom sales-led product. Fixed-price self-serve products in the ecosystem can publish a public payment identity when price, asset, and verification rules are standardized.

checkout_policy.other_assets_policy: Other assets or networks are accepted only through invoice-confirmed instructions.
checkout_policy.pricing_rule: Non-default payments must be priced to a clear USD-equivalent amount before fulfillment.
checkout_policy.release_rule: Credentials or access are released only after funds are confirmed, spendable, and manually approved.

fulfillment_policy.release_condition: Funds must be verified on Base or by invoice, be spendable, and be manually approved before any credentials or access are released.

agent_spending.approval_policy: Agent can only purchase or renew inside the explicit rights granted by the owner.

features: Shared command center for humans and agents
Monthly subscription path in USD or invoice-confirmed crypto

related_clearance.role: Self-serve approval API and fixed-price USDC checkout layer for agents and humans.
